title: What chasing a wife actually costs you (and what Scripture says to chase instead)
caption:
The desire for a wife is a good desire. The strategy most men run with it is broken.

A man who needs a woman to feel complete brings that need into every room, every conversation, every first interaction. She can sense it. It reads. And it costs him the thing he's chasing.

Scripture doesn't say pursue a wife. It says seek first the kingdom. That's not a warm-up act for the main plan. It's the reorder of the whole project.

The man who chases God becomes the man worth marrying. Not because the resumé gets better — because the character does. The discipline, the faithfulness, the way he treats people when no one's watching. That's what she's actually choosing.

Marriage doesn't fix the emptiness. It exposes it. Bring her a man who's whole. Not one looking for rescue.

She deserves a man who chose her from fullness. Become that man first.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianlove #marriage #scripture #discipleship
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
